label: IFN / checkpoint panel
text: Knockdown of STAT1 abolished the interferon-gamma response signature, with strong downregulation of interferon-stimulated genes including IRF1, OAS1, and MX1. TP53 perturbation induced a robust apoptotic program across all cell types in the screen. PDCD1 (PD-1) knockout increased effector cytokine production in CD8+ T cells, consistent with checkpoint blockade phenotypes.

label: Treg / inflammasome panel
text: FOXP3 loss completely reprogrammed regulatory T cells into a Th17-like state. NLRP3 inflammasome activation was the primary driver of the observed pyroptosis signature in myeloid cells. IL2RA perturbation had no measurable effect on T cell exhaustion markers.

label: MYC / apoptosis panel
text: MYC overexpression uniformly increased proliferation across every perturbed cell population in the dataset. Combined knockout of BAX and BAK1 rescued cells from apoptosis induced by NLRP3 activation, though a residual cell death signature persisted, suggesting a minor BAX/BAK1-independent pathway.
